description: arXiv:2309.01271v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Phase diagrams serve as a highly informative tool for materials design, encapsulating information about the phases that a material can manifest under specific conditions. In this work, we develop a method in which Bayesian inference is employed to combine thermodynamic data from molecular dynamics (MD), melting point simulations, and pho...
author: Timofei Miryashkin, Olga Klimanova, Vladimir Ladygin, Alexander Shapeev
